title: DBZ Origins
description: Adds 3 new origins based off races from Dragon Ball Z.
body:
Adds 3 new origins based off races from Dragon Ball Z

Android - Has infinite energy

Namekian - Can't drown, gets regen when under 3 hearts, but can only drink water

Saiyan - Deals more damage on crits, can transform into their Great Ape form during a full moon, giving them strength, resistance, and increasing their size. 

Super Saiyan - Can only be your origin if you were a Saiyan and got the free the end advancement. Replaces Great Ape form with Super Saiyan, which lets you fly, move faster, and hit harder. Keeps all other attributes from Saiyan.
